page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7a.64xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the x86_64 CPU architecture. It features 256 dedicated physical CPU cores with a single thread per core, providing 256 vCPUs of dedicated compute capacity. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor framework.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that workloads do not suffer from resource contention or noisy-neighbor effects.

Given the high core count and balanced memory configuration, this server is suited for large-scale general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, and multi-threaded processing tasks that require dedicated CPU execution without virtualization overhead.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7a.64xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server featuring 256 dedicated physical CPU cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, providing 256 vCPUs of dedicated compute power. It is configured with 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for large-scale general-purpose enterprise applications, multi-threaded processing, and workloads requiring high-throughput network performance and dedicated CPU allocation.

tagline: A high-core dedicated x86_64 instance featuring balanced memory allocation and high-speed baseline network connectivity for demanding enterprise workloads.
